baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Trustee's starter asset. Unlike other tier-0 starters, this card occupies a full asset slot from game start and is never discarded. It represents inherited, stable wealth that compounds indefinitely. Income counts as $1 higher for tax offset purposes (family office status).

flavourText: Some money is old enough to be honest.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Chairman's starter asset. Represents an active acquisition vehicle. On discard: transfer ability 'Draw a personal event card when acquiring Tier 2+ assets' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: Every fund is a story about someone else's mistakes.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Founder's starter asset. Extreme volatility, no income, minimal loan capacity. Represents pre-revenue equity. On discard: transfer ability 'When vertical integration stack completes, all three assets gain +2 permanent loan capacity' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: The promise: infinite returns. The reality: $0 of it.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Foreman's starter asset. Stable operational efficiency. On discard: transfer ability 'MANUFACTURING assets gain +1 loan capacity' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: The machines run. The margins breathe.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Compliance Officer's starter asset. Ultra-stable, regulatory moat. On discard: transfer ability 'Reduce all incoming stress by 1 per incident' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: Safety doesn't generate returns. It generates survival.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Engineer's starter asset. Intellectual property with asymmetric upside. On discard: transfer ability 'All vertical integration stress reductions doubled, simultaneous cross-synergy stacking allowed' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: A patent is a toll booth built in someone's mind.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Quant's starter asset. Extreme volatility, inverted payoff structure. On discard: transfer ability 'On negative GMI years, invert value update outcomes (1=6, 2=5, etc)' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: Betting against the house. The house is you.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Trader (Finance)'s starter asset. Active position management, moderate volatility. On discard: transfer ability 'Reroll one asset value die per year, keep either result' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: Perfect hedges don't exist. But they're fun to try.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Tax Attorney's starter asset. Barely moves, heavily regulated. On discard: transfer ability 'Reclassify up to $2 of income as advisory fees (non-taxable) once per year' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: The money sits here. The law sits with it.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Publicist's starter asset. Narrative-driven, buzz-sensitive. On discard: transfer ability 'All held personal event cards sale values increase by $1 (narrative licensing)' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: The story is the only product that doesn't spoil.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Geologist's starter asset. Resource mapping, volatility tied to commodity prices. On discard: transfer ability 'Peek at top global event card before draw, reposition in deck; ENERGY assets gain GMI amplification +1 tier' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: The best wells are the ones not found yet.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Trader (Energy)'s starter asset. Income-generating commodity exposure. On discard: transfer ability 'Roll d6 once per year on 4-6 earn $1 per ENERGY asset; repositioning free loan transfers' to the first market asset purchased.

The General's starter asset. Classified collateral structure — solo unlock at 1 Defence placement (not standard 2). On discard: transfer ability 'Defence classified collateral requirement reduced from 2 to 1; crisis stress immunity' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: The contracts are classified. The profits are public.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Landowner (Ranger)'s starter asset. Hybrid dual-industry (REAL_ESTATE + TECHNOLOGY). Diverse but balanced. On discard: transfer ability 'TERRAIN BONUS: when you own 3+ industries, all assets gain +1 loan capacity (dynamic)' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: The best eggs are in different baskets.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Actuary (Monk)'s starter asset. Hybrid healthcare/wellness (REAL_ESTATE + MANUFACTURING for hybrid integration). Ultra-stable income. On discard: transfer ability 'STRESS-LINKED LOAN CAPACITY: Earn +1 loan capacity per 2 stress BELOW 4 on healthcare assets; if survive to final round +$5 to score' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: Living forever is expensive. Dying is free.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: The Researcher (Alchemist)'s starter asset. Hybrid pharma R&D (MANUFACTURING + TECHNOLOGY). Pre-revenue biotech volatility. TRIAL DIE mechanic available. On discard: transfer ability 'TRIAL DIE: one-time roll per game; 4-6=success (asset gains +3 to positive deltas, loan capacity upgraded, GMI-sensitive); 1-3=failure (baseLoanCapacity -2, GMI-resistant post-failure)' to the first market asset purchased.

flavourText: The best experiments fail. The best results contradict the hypothesis.
